nodes.label: build_corpus_report.py  Script generates a Markdown report for pipeline output
Generate clean Markdown tables with alignment markers.     This renders correct
Load stopwords from the first path that exists.
Load all per-document issues and inject style/doc_id from directory structure.
Map doc_id -> {line_number: line_length}, using HTR text.     Line numbers are
TRAIN corpus geometry only, by style.     Lower-tail and upper-tail percentiles
Lowercase both GT and HTR before counting.     Skip stopwords and pure capitali
Step 2 only.     Report count and within-style percentage in each line bucket.
Step 2 only.     Correct relative character position calculation:         rela
